title: Bee Removal in Amityville, Long Island | $350 - $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Amityville, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350 - $550 service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Amityville, Long Island, protecting homes and businesses from dangerous bee infestations. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee hives and colonies from properties while prioritizing humane relocation whenever possible. Whether you're dealing with honey bees, carpenter bees, or aggressive hives near your property, we deliver fast and effective solutions.
whyUs: Our Amityville bee removal specialists combine over 15 years of local experience with eco-friendly removal techniques that protect both your property and the environment. We offer transparent pricing between $350 and $550, same-day emergency service, and a satisfaction guarantee that has made us Long Island's most trusted pest control provider.
localContext: Amityville's charming historic homes along Broadway and the waterfront properties near the Great South Bay often attract bee colonies seeking shelter in eaves, chimneys, and older structures. From the tree-lined streets of the Village to newer developments near Sunrise Highway, our team understands the unique pest control challenges facing Amityville residents and responds quickly to protect your family and property.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Amityville range from $350 to $550 depending on the location and size of the hive, accessibility, and severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Amityville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Amityville and Long Island. Most bee removals are completed within 1-3 hours, and we can typically arrive at your property within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, especially for honey bees which are vital pollinators. Our technicians work with local beekeepers to safely relocate colonies. In cases involving aggressive species or dangerous locations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted removal methods.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services covered by homeowners insurance in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Coverage varies by policy, but many homeowners insurance plans in Long Island do cover bee removal if the infestation poses an immediate threat or causes property damage. We provide detailed invoices and documentation to help you file claims with your insurance provider.
